works.title: Coastal Collective
works.description: A Sydney-based fashion brand with a loyal online community. We rebuilt their social strategy from the ground up, leaning into UGC, Reels, and TikTok Shop to drive a 240% increase in social-attributed revenue.

works.title: Ember & Smoke
works.description: A premium restaurant group in Sydney's CBD. We created a content strategy anchored in storytelling and atmosphere, driving consistent foot traffic and a sold-out launch of their new venue.
results: Restaurant sold out for 6 weeks post-launch

works.title: Flux Activewear
works.description: An Australian activewear brand trying to break through a crowded market. We built a TikTok-first influencer strategy that drove their launch collection to sell out within 72 hours.
results: Sold out launch collection in 72 hours

works.title: Verde Health
works.description: A health supplement brand with great products but no social presence. We built their content strategy, visual identity for social, and paid funnel — growing from 200 to 28,000 Instagram followers in one year.
results: 62% of website traffic now from social

works.title: Nori Collective
works.description: A Japanese-Australian fusion dining concept in Melbourne. We told their story through cinematic short-form video, creating a waitlist of 400+ before their doors even opened.

works.title: Lumière Skin
works.description: A clean beauty brand launching into a competitive skincare market. We managed a 40-creator seeding campaign alongside paid Meta ads, achieving a 3.4× ROAS from launch.
